items.title: Popular 49-year-old pizza chain files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
items.description: The pizza restaurant industry is one of the most competitive dining sectors in the U.S., with two pizza giants ranking among the Top 8 of all fast-food chains based on locations in 2025. Domino's had the sixth-most number of locations with 7,014, behind Subway (19,502), Starbucks (16,935), ...

items.title: 3 Spectacular Stocks You Can Buy and Hold Forever
items.author: Parkev Tatevosian, Cfa
items.description: The article discusses long-term investment strategies focusing on stocks that can be held indefinitely, emphasizing the benefits of compounding growth for investors who adopt a buy-and-hold approach.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Highlighted as a recommended long-term investment stock with strong market presence and potential for sustained growth
